LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF VERITY CAPITAL GROUP LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT EAST WEST BANKS FURTHER RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION. ARGUMENT IS HELD. THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: THE REPORT AND RECOMMENDATION OF THE JUDGE PRO TEM IS ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF VERITY CAPITOL GROUP LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION IS GRANTED AS SET FORTH IN THE REPORT AND RECOMMENDATION. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $3,500 ARE AWARDED AGAINST EAST WEST BANKS IN FAVOR OF VERITY TO PAID WITHIN ONE WEEK OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THE COURT'S ORDER. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR NO. 8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM. (302/EPS)

Off Calendar Apr-29-2021 Continued To Aug-23-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Jun-11-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Suzanne Schornack, Esq. (925-274-0200; suzanne@glennwechsler.com) of Law Offices of Glenn H. Wechsler for Plaintiff Verity Capital LLC.
Kevin E. Fusch, Esq. (415-597-7816; kfusch@frenchlyontang.com) of French Lyon Tang for Defendant East West Bank.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT EAST WEST BANK's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication:

Defendant East West Bank's motion for summary judgment is granted in full.

[see word minutes for details.]

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

Defendant East West Bank'S Motion For Summary Judgment (For Tentative Ruling Purposes Only, Part 2 Of 2)
Off Calendar Jun-11-2021 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Apr-14-2021 Continued To Jun-11-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant East West Banks Further Responses To Special Interrogatories And Requests For Production
Off Calendar Apr-22-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via ZOOM videoconference):
Atty. Suzanne Schornack, Esq. of the Law Office of Glenn H. Wechsler, 925.274.0200, for the Plaintiff;
Atty. Kevin Fusch, Esq. of French Lyon Tang, 415.597.7800, for Defendant.

PLAINTIFF VERITY CAPITAL GROUP LLC's Motion To Compel Defendant East West Banks Further Responses To Special Interrogatories And Requests For Production.

Matter called. ARGUMENT is held. At the conclusion of argument, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

The report and recommendation of the judge pro tem is adopted. Plaintiff Verity Capitol Group LLC's motion to compel further responses to special interrogatories and requests for production is granted as set forth in the report and recommendation. Sanctions in the amount of $3,500 are awarded against East West Banks in favor of Verity to paid within one week of notice of entry of the Court's order.

Ms. Schornack informs the Court that a proposed order was submitted in an email to the court yesterday.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant East West Banks Further Responses To Special Interrogatories And Requests For Production

Atty. KEVIN E. FUSCH, Esq. of French Lyon Tang (Tel: 415-597-7800) for defendant East West Bank.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF VERITY CAPITAL GROUP LLC's Motion To Compel Defendant East West Banks Further Responses To Special Interrogatories And Requests For Production.

Plaintiff does not stipulate to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem.

Matter discussed.
